---
title: "NBA Games Data Summary"
author: "Analysis Team"
date: today
format:
  html:
    theme: cosmo
    toc: true
    code-fold: false
---

## Introduction

This document reads and summarizes the NBA historical games dataset from `Games.csv` using R and the `tidyverse` package suite.

## Loading Libraries and Data

First, we load the `tidyverse` library and read in the dataset.

```{r}
#| message: false
#| warning: false
library(tidyverse)

# Read the NBA games dataset
games <- read_csv("Games.csv")
```

## Dataset Overview

Let's examine the structure and size of the dataset.

```{r}
# Display dimensions
dim(games)
```

The dataset contains `r nrow(games)` rows and `r ncol(games)` columns. Here is a glimpse of the columns:

```{r}
glimpse(games)
```

## Preview of the Data

Here are the first few rows of the games dataset:

```{r}
head(games)
```
